updates.name: OpenAI Codex Security
updates.description: AI-powered code security auditor that scans repositories, builds project-specific threat models, and validates vulnerabilities in sandboxed environments. In beta it scanned 1.2M commits and found 10,561 high-severity issues with an 84% reduction in alert noise.

updates.name: Helios
updates.description: Open-source 14B video generation model from Peking University and ByteDance that produces minute-long videos at 19.5 FPS on a single H100 GPU. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, and video-to-video with only ~6GB VRAM needed. Apache 2.0 licensed.

updates.name: Kiwi-Edit
updates.description: Fully open-source AI video editing framework that supports instruction-guided and reference-guided edits using natural language. Handles style transfers, object removal/replacement, and background swaps at 720p. MIT licensed with models and datasets released.

updates.name: OpenClaw
updates.description: Open-source autonomous AI assistant that lives on your machine and connects to WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and 20+ messaging platforms. It can browse the web, manage files, and run shell commands autonomously. 247K GitHub stars and growing.

updates.name: Amazon Connect Health
updates.description: AWS's HIPAA-eligible AI agent platform for healthcare with five capabilities: patient verification, appointment scheduling, patient history summaries, ambient clinical documentation, and medical coding. UC San Diego Health saved 630 hours/week in early results.

updates.name: Seedance 2.0
updates.description: ByteDance's multimodal AI video generator that accepts up to 12 simultaneous inputs (images, video, audio, text) and generates 1080p video with native audio — dialogue, ambient sounds, and effects matched frame by frame. Available via CapCut/Jianying.

updates.name: Friendware
updates.description: Native macOS AI copilot that provides system-wide tab-to-complete in any app. It reads your screen context, understands who you're talking to, and adapts tone per contact. Claims to cut message composition time from 45 seconds to 4 seconds.

updates.name: Qwen 3.5 Small
updates.description: Alibaba's new dense model series with 0.8B, 2B, 4B, and 9B variants. The 9B model matches GPT-OSS-120B (a model 13x its size) on key benchmarks, and the 2B model runs on any recent iPhone in airplane mode with just 4GB of RAM.

updates.name: HY-WorldPlay (Tencent Hunyuan)
updates.description: Tencent released its RL post-training code for training real-time interactive world models based on HunyuanVideo that run at 24 FPS. Enables the community to build interactive, game-like video environments from AI-generated content.

updates.name: LTX 2.3
updates.description: Open-source short-form video generation model that wins on resolution, frame rate, and integrated audio for production content. Ideal for creating polished short clips with synchronized sound, rivaling proprietary alternatives in quality.
